title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
